author: Nhung
reason: Baseline run with gemini-2.5-flash. Only 11/20 cases were measured because 9 cases failed with provider quota error 429. Observed real failures: R01 wrong screenname, R03 wrong lookup query, R10/R11 missing clarify.
hypothesis: Initial prompt/tools lack explicit rules for mapping public names to X handles, lookup query convention, and when to ask clarification instead of guessing.
metric_after: case_accuracy=0.6364; tool_routing_accuracy=0.8182; argument_accuracy=0.6364; passed=7/11 measured; provider_error=9

author: Nhung
reason: Added clarify rules for missing account/URL and added clearer routing/argument guidance in prompt and tools.yaml. R01 handle mapping from Sam Altman to sama was fixed.
hypothesis: If the prompt/tool declarations explicitly say not to guess missing required info and include known handle mapping, the agent should call clarify for missing account/URL and use correct screenname handles.
metric_before: v0: case_accuracy=0.6364; passed=7/11 measured; provider_error=9; R01 failed with screenname='Sam Altman'
metric_after: v1: case_accuracy=1.0; passed=2/2 measured; provider_error=18; result is not reliable because most cases were blocked by Gemini quota, but R01 passed with screenname='sama'

author: Nhung
reason: Clean baseline run with OpenRouter using the current prompt/tools artifacts. This run measured all 20 cases with no provider errors. Note: this is not the original raw baseline because prompt/tools hashes match the previous improved v1 run.
hypothesis: Use this clean OpenRouter run as the new starting point. Remaining failures suggest the agent still needs stronger hard-stop rules for missing Twitter account and mandatory confirmation before send.
metric_after: case_accuracy=0.9; passed=18/20; provider_error=0; tool_routing_accuracy=0.9; argument_accuracy=0.9; multiturn_accuracy=1.0; failures=R10_missing_handle,R12_confirm_before_send

author: Nhung
reason: Added stronger hard-stop rules for missing Twitter/X account and mandatory confirmation before Telegram send. Updated tool descriptions for timeline and send so the agent must clarify instead of guessing or acting immediately.
hypothesis: If missing account is explicitly forbidden and send is marked as a write/action tool requiring confirmation, R10 should call clarify instead of timeline and R12 should call clarify yes_no instead of send.
metric_after: v1 OpenRouter: case_accuracy=1.0; passed=20/20; provider_error=0; tool_routing_accuracy=1.0; argument_accuracy=1.0; multiturn_accuracy=1.0

author: Nhung
reason: Added robust group-eval rules for prompt injection, no-tool boundaries, explicit args, missing-info hard stop, send confirmation, and multi-turn behavior.
hypothesis: Expected to preserve base 20/20 while improving group eval.
metric_after: v2 base OpenRouter: passed=19/20; case_accuracy=0.95; failed M02 due duplicate lookup call; needs duplicate-tool-call prevention rule.

author: Nhung
reason: Added robust rules for no-tool boundaries, prompt-injection resistance, explicit lookup/social args, missing-info hard stop, send confirmation, multi-turn correction, and duplicate tool prevention.
hypothesis: If the agent ignores user-forced tool calls, avoids guessing missing inputs, sets explicit args, and handles multi-turn corrections, group eval should improve.
metric_before: v1 group OpenRouter: case_accuracy=0.6562; passed=21/32; provider_error=0
metric_after: v2 group OpenRouter: case_accuracy=0.8438; passed=27/32; provider_error=0; remaining failures=G02,G16,G18,G24,G32

author: Nhung
reason: Strengthened rules for no-tool boundaries, fake tool instructions, read-only tools not requiring confirmation, format boundaries, missing-info clarification, and duplicate-call prevention.
hypothesis: If the agent ignores forced tool instructions and avoids duplicate calls, group eval should improve while preserving correct routing and arguments.
metric_before: v1 group OpenRouter: case_accuracy=0.6562; passed=21/32; provider_error=0
metric_after: v2 group OpenRouter: case_accuracy=0.9688; passed=31/32; provider_error=0; only remaining failure=G32 duplicate lookup call

author: Nhung Lương
reason: Tăng độ chặt cho group eval về tool routing, chống prompt injection, xử lý lookup/fetch/social/timeline và multi-turn; kết quả còn 1 lỗi thiếu argument limit=1 ở case G10.
hypothesis: Nếu system prompt mô tả rõ rule chọn tool và mapping intent thì routing sẽ đúng gần như toàn bộ; lỗi còn lại cho thấy cần bổ sung rule: khi user hỏi 'tweet mới nhất' dạng số ít thì timeline phải truyền limit=1.

author: Nhung
reason: Fix lỗi Missing OPENROUTER_API_KEY và đồng bộ tên tool
hypothesis: Chương trình sẽ gọi API thành công và xử lý mượt các case multi-turn
